issuers.description: This sandbox credential issuer from the Dutch Chamber of Commerce (Kamer van Koophandel), hosted by Credenco, supports a range of credentials used in pilots, experiments, and demonstrations to explore interoperable digital trust.

This sandbox credential issuer from the Dutch Tax Administration (Belastingdienst), hosted by Credenco, supports a range of credentials used in pilots, experiments, and demonstrations to explore interoperable digital trust.
